body: "‚Äã‚ÄãThis statement describes the steps and actions taken by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government during the period 2024-25 with the aim of meeting the principles of the Research Integrity Concordat and embedding them in internal processes and guidance.‚Äã "
